label: arithmetic -- add-sub cancel: (x + y + 1) - x
ir:
define i32 @f(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %0 = add i32 %x, %y
  %1 = add i32 %0, 1
  %2 = sub i32 %1, %x
  ret i32 %2
}

label: arithmetic -- multiply by 1 identity
arithmetic -- add zero identity
arithmetic -- add then subtract cancel
bitwise -- xor with zero
bitwise -- and with all-ones
bitwise -- xor self equals zero
comparison -- icmp eq self (always true)
shifts -- shl by zero identity
select_phi -- select with true condition
bitwise -- complex and-xor-or chain
ir:
define i32 @f(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %1 = and i32 %x, %y
  %2 = xor i32 %1, -1
  %3 = or i32 %x, %y
  %4 = and i32 %2, %3
  ret i32 %4
}
